meaning: v.快而含糊地说,吱吱喳喳地叫,闲聊n.快而含糊不清的话
examples: Mr. T is telling fools to quit their jibber-jabber.
Jabber has a much larger peer network than JXTA.
"The new battleground will take place in the corporate world, " says Jabber's Balgley.
With all the jabber about the need to create jobs, you'd think these two deals would be no-brainers, particularly the one with Colombia.
